scripts.setup: cd backend && uv sync && cd ../frontend && pnpm install && cd ../llm && swift build -c release
scripts.run: (cd backend && PRM_DEBUG_WORKERS=1 PRM_DEBUG_API=1 uv run uvicorn main:app --reload --reload-exclude .venv) & (cd frontend && pnpm dev)
scripts.run:backend: cd backend && uv run uvicorn main:app --reload --reload-exclude .venv
scripts.reset: rm -rf ~/.prm/ && cd backend && uv sync && cd ../frontend && pnpm install && cd ../llm && swift build -c release
scripts.test: cd backend && uv run pytest && cd ../frontend && pnpm test --run
scripts.lint: cd backend && uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format --check . && cd ../frontend && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck
scripts.build: cd llm && swift build -c release && cd ../frontend && pnpm build:mac
